name: Tunnel
original_name: ปริศนาล่าข้ามเวลา
overview: A detective jumps to 30 years into future while chasing a killer through a tunnel. The murders which stopped 30 years ago are going to start again. Can the detective find the killer and return to his original time or is he going to lose more people in the chase of cat and mouse?

trailers.title: TUNNEL ปริศนาล่าข้ามเวลา (Trailer) | เริ่ม 9 ก.ย.
